Percentage padding: this box has 4% vertical and 8% horizontal padding, resolved against the containing block width.
min-width widens this box: the declared width is 80pt but min-width 260pt wins.
This block is pushed in by a 15% left margin.

Clipped line one.

Clipped line two.

Clipped line three should be cut off.

And line four.

max-height caps this.

Second line is clipped.

Third line gone.

Relatively positioned, shifted right by 10%.
